ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "quartile" TEXT /* Quartile in which the course is typically offered */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received for the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn, completed) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_coorerequisites" (
  "coerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "coerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_coorerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_coorerequisites_coerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("coerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "sequence_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sequences_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_sequences_sequence_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term in which the course is offered */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the course availability (e.g., available, not available) */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats available for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)
